description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a combination of materials including white plaster, exposed brick, and stonework. The structure features large balconies with metal railings on both the first and second floors, providing ample outdoor space. A wooden pergola covers part of the upper balcony, adding architectural interest and partial shade. The house sits on a landscaped plot with a curved driveway leading to a garage entrance at the lower level. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a mix of vertical strips and larger openings, and the main entryway is subtly integrated into the facade. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of natural and industrial materials.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roof, large balconies, and a mix of white plaster, brick, and stone. Features include a wooden pergola, metal railings, and a landscaped driveway.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entry, exposed brick section, stonework base, and the wooden pergola over the upper balcony.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the wide balconies, metal railings, and the driveway curving toward the garage.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the long stone base, asymmetrical window placement, and the pergola structure extending from the side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back balcony, pergola, and the driveway leading to the garage entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with vertical strips and large openings
attribute_entryway_design: Subtle main entry with minimal overhang, integrated into the brick facade, and accessed via a curved driveway with stone steps.
